title: Supabase Vector Store returns empty array
symptom: When using the Supabase Vector Store node in 'Retrieve Documents' mode, it returns an empty array instead of expected results.
not_this_if: The node returns results in 'Insert Documents' mode
Different table structure or index configuration
root_cause: The issue may arise from improper setup of the Supabase function or mismatched embedding dimensions. If the `match_documents` function is not correctly created or if the vector dimensions do not match, the retrieval process can fail, resulting in an empty array.
fix_steps: Ensure the `match_documents` function is properly created in your Supabase database by running the complete SQL setup script.
Verify that the vector column in your Supabase table is set to 1536 dimensions, matching the embedding dimensions used.
Test the connection by using the Supabase Vector Store in 'Insert Documents' mode to confirm it works before switching back to 'Retrieve Documents' mode.
Check for any naming issues with the table or column, especially if there are spaces in the names.
agent_instruction: Follow the troubleshooting steps to ensure proper setup and configuration of the Supabase Vector Store node.
